text.message: Hope 910 doesn’t get plowed for you I was afraid and pointed away
Red I know you’re going for sheep port I don’t want to contest you but I’m building on 84 and pointing down can we not fight
i wont win the race anyways
i had to pick this akward 8 3 10 so i dont get plowed
Have you all ever played with someone where if you make one move they don't agree with they report you for kingmaking
Alright at some point we can't ignore red right?
At some point I just share too much to rob them
We just can’t feed them city
nice hit the road player xD
You’re kinda winning and uncontested on road we gotta rob you
They can just connect the other way bro lol
I didn’t wanna do that but ya but it slowed their game a bit and decreased the roads they have available
So aggravating when you can't pull that 3rd knight lol
Sorry red lol, gotta keep you at bay tho
there still hasnt been a 10 yet
So you give green win they have two vp lol
I would have helped you if needed
no thats what you did by robbing me
oh sure you really helped me all game xD
Everyone take a breather the game is still gonna go on
